title: Naomi Watts wants women to own their menopause journey: 'Why is it so taboo when we are half the population?'
summary_full: Actress and entrepreneur Naomi Watts founded Stripes Beauty with a singular mission: helping women take control of menopause health and aging with confidence.
summary_public: Actress and entrepreneur Naomi Watts founded Stripes Beauty with a singular mission: helping women take control of menopause health and aging with confidence.
